description: Propose controls classified by the S-T-O-P hierarchy.

fixtures.prompt: Scenario: packaging line changeover with a jammed carton sensor. Propose S-T-O-P controls, preferring substitution or technical measures before PPE. Return JSON only.

expectedShape.humanReviewNote: Reviewer checks usefulness, safety-domain fit, and whether the output avoids inventing facts.
